heading: Omitted
label: 65b, 66 Omitted
notes: CodificationSections 65b, 66, relating to Territory of Alaska, were omitted in view of admission of Alaska into the Union.Section 65b, , , prescribed salary of secretary of Territory.act Apr. 3, 1944, ch. 155, § 158 Stat. 187Section 66, , , related to fees of secretary of Territory.act Mar. 3, 1905, ch. 1497, § 133 Stat. 1265
